heading: Safety and soundness firewalls applicable to financial subsidiaries of banks
label: 1831w Safety and soundness firewalls applicable to financial subsidiaries of banks

children.text: the State bank and each insured depository institution affiliate of the State bank are well capitalized (after the capital deduction required by paragraph (2));
the State bank complies with the capital deduction and financial statement disclosure requirements in ;section 24a(c) of this title
the State bank complies with the financial and operational safeguards required by ; andsection 24a(d) of this title
the State bank complies with the amendments to sections 23A and 23B of the Federal Reserve Act [ and 371c–1] made by section 121(b) of the Gramm-Leach-Bliley Act.12 U.S.C. 371c

children.heading: Preservation of existing subsidiaries
children.label: b Preservation of existing subsidiaries
children.text: Notwithstanding subsection (a), an insured State bank may retain control of a subsidiary, or retain an interest in a subsidiary, that the State bank lawfully controlled or acquired before , and conduct through such subsidiary any activities lawfully conducted in such subsidiary as of such date.November 12, 1999

children.heading: Subsidiary
children.label: 1 Subsidiary
children.text: The term “subsidiary” means any company that is a subsidiary (as defined in ) of 1 or more insured banks.section 1813(w)(4) of this title

children.heading: Financial subsidiary
children.label: 2 Financial subsidiary
children.text: The term “financial subsidiary” has the meaning given the term in .section 24a(g) of this title

children.heading: This chapter
children.label: 1 This chapter
children.text: No provision of this section shall be construed as superseding the authority of the Federal Deposit Insurance Corporation to review subsidiary activities under .section 1831a of this title

children.heading: Federal Reserve Act
children.label: 2 Federal Reserve Act
children.text: No provision of this section shall be construed as affecting the applicability of the 20th undesignated paragraph of section 9 of the Federal Reserve Act [].12 U.S.C. 335
